arts.ttl: Chelsea star Tosin explains what has impressed him most about Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea are beginning to look smooth under Enzo Maresca with Saturday's 3-0 win away to West Ham their most emphatic win for some time - and defender Tosin says their performance was down to the head coach's attention for detail

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Barrow: Carabao Cup prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: Blues strong favourites to reach the fourth round

arts.ttl: What Reece James did during Chelsea win vs West Ham speaks volumes in Enzo Maresca injury crisis
arts.sum: Maresca chose Wesley Fofana as a makeshift replacement at right-back for the trip but even he was seen hobbling at full-time having spent much of the past three years out with injury too. It is almost 12 months since Chelsea last won a Premier League game that Reece James started.

arts.ttl: Man Utd battle for ex-Chelsea wonderkid
arts.sum: Dibling won a penalty against Man Utd, which was subsequently missed by Cameron Archer, while he scored his first senior goal for Southampton during their 1-1 draw versus Ipswich Town on Saturday. Manchester United are targeting a move for Southampton wonderkid Tyler Dibling, but they are set to face significant competition for his signature.

arts.ttl: Chelsea & Man Utd face unwanted Real Madrid competition
arts.sum: Real Madrid have joined the race to sign RB Leipzig centre-back Castello Lukeba, according to reports in Spain. Real Madrid missed out on the aforementioned Yoro this summer and the Spanish giants are eager to sign a new centre-back next year following Nacho Fernandez’s move to Saudi Arabia.
